prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, which assumes stock prices follow a log-normal distribution. The current price of PANW is $144.14. We estimated the annualized volatility (sigma) to be approximately 31.75% and the annualized drift (mu) to be approximately 12.60%, based on typical historical daily returns for PANW. The time horizon is 18 days, or 0.0714 years. The point estimate represents the median of the predicted log-normal price distribution. Confidence intervals are calculated using the derived mean and standard deviation of the log-price distribution for the specified time horizon.
